name: guardrail-lsp
description: Language Server Protocol support for Guardrail PHP static analysis

guardrailLsp.symbolTablePath.description: Path to symbol_table.json file (relative to workspace root or absolute path)

guardrailLsp.guardrailPath.description: Path to Guardrail installation directory (leave empty to auto-detect from vendor)

guardrailLsp.phpPath.description: Path to PHP executable (leave empty to use 'php.exe' on Windows or 'php' on other platforms)

guardrailLsp.useWSL.description: Run the LSP server in WSL (Windows Subsystem for Linux)

guardrailLsp.wslDistribution.description: WSL distribution name to use (e.g., 'Ubuntu-24.04', leave empty for default)

guardrailLsp.trace.server.description: Traces the communication between VS Code and the language server
